final_answer_summary: Forge wrote a safe LLM turn receipt under memory/llm_memory_v1. This proves the ledger can remember recommendations without storing hidden chain-of-thought or touching project files.
recommendations: Run llm-memory-show latest, llm-memory-search patch75, llm-memory-session, and llm-memory-export.
user_request_summary: Patch 75 smoke test for LLM Memory Ledger
